name: Playtest 21: Storm Front
description:
TESTS: AoE push on failed save (Thunderwave), no push on successful save, AI using Repelling Blast push, Shove tactic (prone + push choice), shove contested Athletics check, forced movement + zone interaction, multiple creatures pushed by same AoE.

Elara and Thorin face a Cultist Warlock and hobgoblin soldiers in a ruined temple. The warlock uses Repelling Blast to push players away while hobgoblins close to melee. Elara's Thunderwave can push multiple enemies on a failed save. Thorin's high STR makes him ideal for testing the Shove tactic -- pushing enemies into walls or knocking them prone for advantage on follow-up attacks. The central zone of difficult terrain represents rubble that creatures can be pushed through.
